text:
<https://www.freshports.org/www/falkon#description>

> Falkon was orignially known as Qupzila. …

Correction: QupZilla

Source: <https://www.falkon.org/about/>

> Falkon is a new and very fast … 

It's fast, but no longer new; it's more than two years old. 

> This project has been originally …

Grammar: _was_ originally
